creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
When I try to build the newest version of Azureus (2.5.0.4), I can not get it
to build at all.  I have had this problem for months now, and I figured that
the problem might be that I was still using JDK 1.4 instead of 1.5, so I
recently installed JDK 1.5 and then tried to recompile Azureus again.  It
still doesn't want to compile but the errors were different this time,
relating to swt.  I tried to rebuild all ports that relied on JDK in any
way, and Azureus still refuses to build.  Below is what I get when I try:

--->  Upgrading 'azureus-2.5.0.0' to 'azureus-2.5.0.4' (net-p2p/azureus)

How-To-Repeat: I don't know if this problem is specific to me or not, but it happens every time
I try to build Azurues.
